LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.description: A splash of acid that continues to cause burn wounds for quite some time after the initial attack.
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.label: acid burn
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.0.label: minor, receiving burns
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.1.label: moderate, receiving burns
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.2.label: serious, receiving burns
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBurn.label: acid burn
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.description: Shrouded in a veil of controlled invisibility.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.label: invisibility
LanguageData.VEF_Kamikaze.label: sudden detonation
LanguageData.VEF_Kamikaze.stages.0.label: initial-hidden
LanguageData.VEF_Kamikaze.stages.1.label: critical
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.description: This creature feeds on sunlight. Inadequate levels of light will kill it.
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.label: level of sunlight
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.0.label: adequate light
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.1.label: poor light levels
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.2.label: very low light levels
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.3.label: lack of sunlight
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.4.label: extreme lack of sustenance
LanguageData.VEF_PermanentBurn.description: A permanent burn scar that cannot be treated.
LanguageData.VEF_PermanentBurn.label: permanent burn
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.description: Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons. \nAt high doses, toxic buildup is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers. \nContrary to base game toxic buildup, creatures who die with this toxic damage can be eaten.
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.label: toxic buildup
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.VEF_ToxicBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.description: Dangerously low core body temperature. Unless re-warmed, hypothermic slowdown gets worse and ends in death. Recovery is quick once the victim is re-warmed.
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.label: hypothermic slowdown
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.stages.3.label: serious
LanguageData.VFEP_HypothermicSlowdown.stages.4.label: extreme
